$comment: Treadmill repo Claude Code settings. See ADR-0008 for the auto-capture hook and Stop-hook session-end sweep. See ADR-0061 for the role-ui-triage permission allowlist below.

permissions.$comment: Narrow allow patterns required by role-ui-triage (ADR-0061). The agent worker runs claude with `--permission-mode acceptEdits`, which auto-approves Edit/Write/NotebookEdit but still blocks Bash + WebFetch in `--print` (headless) mode. Other roles do their bulk file I/O via Edit/Write and route git through workers/agent/treadmill_agent/git.py (Python, not Claude Bash) — so this allowlist exists primarily to unblock triage's Playwright-probe-then-POST pipeline. Each pattern is scoped to the exact shape the v1.2 prompt invokes: the /tmp/triage-<run_id> artifact dir, the bundled /opt/triage probe script, the internal treadmill-api hostname for the POST and dedup-check curls, and the gh read-only ops for the duplicate-open-PR suppression signal. Narrow on purpose — widening is a deliberate ADR-style decision, not a slip.
